text:
State Changed
From-To: feedback->SUspended

Unsure on how to change the status for this one.  I've set it to suspended 
because I've used the disks in question on a Compaq Prolient.  We'd need to 
know what make/model of Prolient you used, and so forth to be able to advance 
this further.
